Describe what is happening
canonical_answer: The person stands facing forward while lifting sections of dark hair above their head. They wear a black short-sleeved t-shirt and a silver bracelet on the left wrist. A large rectangular mirror with a dark frame reflects a lamp in the background. A white light switch plate is mounted on the wall to the left of the person.

question: Describe the sequence of appearance changes and actions performed by the woman in the black top throughout the clip.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a person with dark hair styled in an updo stands with their back to the camera; at 6s, a woman with wavy hair wearing a black long-sleeved top faces forward speaking; at 10s, she holds a black styling tool near her hair; at 12s, she wears a black short-sleeved t-shirt while raising hands to adjust her hair.

question: Describe the specific hand movements and styling tools visible as the woman prepares her hair.
canonical_answer: At 0s, text overlay identifies the style as a pull-through braid; at 6s, the woman gestures with her left hand raised near shoulder height; at 10s, she holds a black curling iron near her wavy hair; at 12s, both hands are raised to the top of her head touching her hair.
